----.-        .--- ----.-               -.-   ----  ----------. ---  ---- ---  --------.- .---------
--.-           --- --.-                 ---    --.    .-.---.   .-.  --.  ---    ------     -----..
  ⚡  CLI for Nomos Energy API  ·  nomos.energy

  ╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
  › nomos login               save credentials for future calls
  › nomos capabilities        browse all available API endpoints
  › nomos call <operation>    call any endpoint by operation key
  › nomos operations          list all operation keys
  ╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

Usage: nomos [options] [command]

Nomos Energy SDK CLI

Options:
  -V, --version               output the version number
  -h, --help                  display help for command

Commands:
  help                        Display help
  login [options]             Login and persist auth defaults for future nomos
                              commands
  versions                    List available OpenAPI versions
  capabilities [options]      Show grouped operation overview and version diff
  everything [options]        Display the full endpoint overview (same as
                              capabilities)
  new-endpoints               Show endpoints that are new in the latest spec
                              compared to the earliest available spec
  operations [options]        List operation keys
  call [options] <operation>  Call an operation by key
  oauth-token [options]       Convenience helper for POST /oauth/token
  grid-fee-reductions         Edison grid fee reductions endpoints
  meter-orders                Edison meter orders endpoints

• Run nomos <command> --help for command details
